'''''Mharsup''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]],<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> it had a mission to evacuate a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] research and development station, since the station's defenses were crippled. [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] in a TIE Defender protected the bulk freighter from attack by [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin's]] forces, who were attempting to destroy the facility, and the TIE Defender prototypes, which were loaded into the freighter by technicians from the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] ''[[G'nabgib]]''. The freighter then made it into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Both the freighter and the shuttle, despite an attempt to be captured by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] led by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Hunu]]'', delivered the prototypes to the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] ''[[Hashim group]]''.
